'''dalaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwd|kwd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwd|kwd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dalaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dælæbæth|dælæbæth]] || [[word:dælæbæj|dælæbæj]] || [[word:dælæbæsh|dælæbæsh]] || [[word:dælæbæ|dælæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalalabath|dalalabath]] || [[word:dalalabaj|dalalabaj]] || [[word:dalalabash|dalalabash]] || [[word:dalalaba|dalalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalabath|dalabath]] || [[word:dalabaj|dalabaj]] || [[word:dalabash|dalabash]] || [[word:dalaba|dalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalafbath|dalafbath]] || [[word:dalafbaj|dalafbaj]] || [[word:dalafbash|dalafbash]] || [[word:dalafbaf|dalafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dalabatha|dalabatha]] || [[word:dalabaja|dalabaja]] || [[word:dalabasha|dalabasha]] || [[word:dalabaka|dalabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dalabath|dalabath]] || [[word:dalabaj|dalabaj]] || [[word:dalabash|dalabash]] || [[word:dalaba|dalaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dalabathal|dalabathal]] || [[word:dalabajal|dalabajal]] || [[word:dalabashal|dalabashal]] || [[word:dalabakal|dalabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dalabathatha|dalabathatha]] || [[word:dalabajaja|dalabajaja]] || [[word:dalabashasha|dalabashasha]] || [[word:dalabaka|dalabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dalabathan|dalabathan]] || [[word:dalabajan|dalabajan]] || [[word:dalabashan|dalabashan]] || [[word:dalabakan|dalabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dalabathaoro|dalabathaoro]] || [[word:dalabajaoro|dalabajaoro]] || [[word:dalabashaoro|dalabashaoro]] || [[word:dalabakaoro|dalabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
